scripts.build:cf: astro build && find ../../data/raw/matters -type f -name "*pdf" | while IFS= read -r f; do rel="${f#../../data/raw/matters/}"; mkdir -p "dist/matters/$(dirname "$rel")"; cp "$f" "dist/matters/$(dirname "$rel")/"; done
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build:cf && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=accc-mergers --branch=astro-preview
